homeHero.title: Hi, I'm Ricardo Canul
homeHero.description: A passionate software developer specializing in web development. I create modern and responsive websites and applications that provide seamless user experiences.

homeAbout.title: About Me
homeAbout.header: Mastering the Art of Backend Engineering
description_paragraphs: I am a dedicated Backend Developer with a deep-rooted expertise in PHP, having spent over 4 years building enterprise-grade applications using Laravel and Symfony. My journey has always been driven by the pursuit of clean, maintainable code and system performance.

In recent years, I've expanded my horizons into the Python ecosystem, embracing Django; and FastAPI. This shift was sparked by a growing interest in Data Science and machine learning, allowing me to build smarter, more predictive backend services.
